channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-22 to 2026-07-28
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.5 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 9 kt WSW, water 68°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.5 ft). Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt N, water 68°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); wind direction off (N). Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt N, water 69°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N). Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 6 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNE). Sun 2026-07-26: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 3 kt NW, water 70°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-07-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 71°F. Low tide: 00:21, 12:15. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Tue 2026-07-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 6 kt SSW, water 71°F. Low tide: 01:05, 13:01. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.8 sec); wind direction off (SSW).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.5 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 9 kt WSW, water 68°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.5 ft).
  • Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt N, water 68°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); wind direction off (N).
  • Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt N, water 69°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N).
  • Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 6 kt NNE, water 70°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNE).
  • Sun 2026-07-26: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 3 kt NW, water 70°F. Low tide: 11:29. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-07-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 71°F. Low tide: 00:21, 12:15. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Tue 2026-07-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 6 kt SSW, water 71°F. Low tide: 01:05, 13:01. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.8 sec); wind direction off (SSW).
